S.FORM: == Pisacepo' lisin no Ta'eman a niyaro' == Misacepo', Mikesi', Milaedis, Komoris To mihecahecaan, kalalaedan no saka lima folad saka enem folad, mili'ayaw to ko kakitaan no niyaro' ato mama no kapah masasowal to romi'ad ato mitelek, ikor o mama no kapah mipasifana' to finawlan no niyaro' to pisacepo'an lisin a romi'ad. Paso'elin ko 'Amis finacadan a tamdaw to to'as o milakecay to riyar a tayni sanay, orasaka o piahowid to nano pidipot to to'as a kawas no riyar patalahekal nai riyar saka ira ko pisacepo' a lisin. Matiniay pisacepo' a lisin, o pahapinangay to lekakawa no finacadan a saka'orip ato pingodo to kasairaira no tataparan. Mitolon to sakadofoh no piniala ato saka rihaday a mifoting. Pisacepo', Milaedis han no Cikasoan a 'Amis ko sowal, ono pasawaliay a 'Amis Misacepo' han ko sowal, ono katimolay a 'Amis Mikesi' han ko sowal, ono mililisay to tarawadaw to 'alo a 'Amis o Komoris han ko sowal, saka o kasasiroma to no niyaro' a sowal. Sapidemak to lisin to pisacepo', i'ayaw no kailisinan ko pidemak, nikawrira kasaniyaro' caay kalecad ko romi'ad, salongan itira i saka 6 folad tangasa saka 8 folad. Kaitiraan no niyaro' a masasiroma, saka ira ko pisacepo' ano eca mikomoris sanay a sowal. Pisacepo', ono 'Amis a tamdaw pahapinang to piahowid to kawas no riyar ato kawas no kakarayan ato sera, nawhani paso'elin ko 'Amis a tamdaw ira ko kasahirahira a kawas maparocek itini i tataparan, orasaka mingodo cangra to tataparan, nanay to mihecahecaan ci nialaay to kadofahay a foting ato 'afar. I pisacepo'an no niyaro' caay ka nga'ay mikihatiya ko fafahiyan, o nano rocok no to'as ano mikihatiya ko fafahiyan to pisacepo'an i, malo sakacaay pakaala to foting a mifoting saan. Patinako to no Ta'eman a niyaro', i 'ayaw pisacepo' no niyaro' i, o mama no kapah, pali'ayaw to kapah no niyaro' i 'ayaw pisacepo'an a dadaya tala riyar a micelem mifoting saka, toya niceleman kinaira sa'opoen i pisacepo'an a romi'ad, oya lakeling ato pakarongay ko midemakay (mikiskis to cikaf no foting, misiiked ato mitangtang). O roma kasasiiked selal a kapah citodong to roma a tayal (miala to dangah, hemay, kasoy, pakamaro'an to mato'asay, mitisil kasaselal). Itiya i, o mama no kapah malahakelong to kakitaan no niyaro' a tomok tayra pi'edawan kaitiraan. Sacepo' a lisin Sarakat, o kapah no niyaro' patelien i palo' ato i papah no pawli pateli koya nialaan a foting, masatisil ko mama no kapah i aikor no sapipacakat a losid, tahidangen ko kakitaan no niyaro' a tomok citodongay mipacakat a mita'ong, mifetir to epah, pakaen to toron a mitolon, miahowid to pidipot, ciniala to foting ato mamaala i riyar, mapakadofah ko pinaloma, pilitod ato sakarihaday no finawlan i niyaro'. (Mingitangit to malataw, to'as no niyaro' midipot to finawlan, ano tala riyar to, tala'alo to a mifoting, talalotok to maomah a kadofah, rihaday a minokay.) Pacakat ko kakitaan no niyaro' : "Waw‚Ä¶, Malatawaw! tayni kami anini. Itini i riyar, loma' no miso, nanay pafelien kami to iraay a alaen niyam, adihayen ko paini i tamiyan saka, itini kami a pacakat to sapakaen i tisowanan, layapen kaenen ko paini niyam to toron, o 'icep ato epah, ta malasang to kamo. Tengilen ko sowal no mama no kapah, o kakitaan no niyaro' o tomok, todong pacakat no finawlan no niyaro', saka, itini kami a mi'aray tisowanan malataw, ta fangcal ko piala niyam to kakaenen niyam tonini a riyar, dipoten ko tayniay a micekiway, micelemay mifoting, mitafokoday, patikeday mialaay to kakaenen a tamdaw i tamowanan, sanga'ayen parihadayen ko mialaay to kakaenen, pafelien ko mialaay to malo sapakaen to laloma'an a wawa ato saka'orip niyam saka, miaray i tisowanan. Kafecol to, kalasang to kamo. Waw‚Ä¶" Maherek ko kakitaan no niyaro'mitolon to pipacakat, ala mitatoy ko mama no kapah to takid, pasiriyar mita'ong to kawas mitakid, pasowal sa: "Ini ko epah, miso to koni, miaray to pipakalemed." Maherek ko pita'ong i, masasitakid (palemed) ko mama no kapah. Paherek ko pipacakat, o mama no kappa ato kakitaan no niyaro' patiko tayra i kasa'opoan pahanhan. I pahanhanan i, o kakitaan no niyaro' ato kalas no niyaro' masasowasowal, pa'eses ko kakitaan to kalas no niyaro' pasowal to todong lekakawa no pisaxepo' a pahecian, o pitodong no kasararerarem a midotoc tonini a tadamaanay a ponka no 'Amis. O kimad no to'asan a pisacepo'. Ira ko 4 tinako : Saka cecay, tato'asan no 'Amis to fa'inayan fafahiyan a malikakaay tatosa, ira ko tata'akay lenlen i niyaro' malikid tayra i riyar, malemed to pipadang kawas no riyar patalasekal (Taywan) mapa'orip, mirayray to teloc. O sapiahowidaw to pipa'orip no kawas saka, itira i katasekalan toya romi'ad no mihecaan, midemak ko teloc no 'Amis a misacepo' a lisin. Saka tosa, ira ko cecay takaraway mafana'ay mi'edaw Alikakay a tamdaw, mirawraw to nga'ayay 'orip no finacadan, awaay ko pasicowaan no finawlan itiya. Oya pipadamso no kawas no riyar to sapisafa to Alikakay, ikor masasitelek to, pita'ongan to kawas no riyar a misacepo' i, o 'icep, epah ato toron ko sapacakat i Alikakay, pakadofahen no Alikakay ko ma'oripay a foting, 'afar i riyar i 'alo, sakaira piniala no 'Amis a tamdaw. Saka tolo, o 'Amis a tamdaw ci Maciwciw, tona mipodpod cingra to kasoy i lilis no riyar i, talifahal sa ma'emod no 'iso, mata'elif ko pinapina romi'ad i, pakayra i nifalahan masadak tayra i riyar, ta malikid tayra toya Falaysan, rofoen a malakakaenen nasa, saan mapalafac milaliw tayra i riyar, kasini'adaen no 'iso cingra saka, manga'ay ko pinokay tayra i niyaro'. O piahowid no teloc to pa'orip no 'iso, midemak ko teloc no 'Amis a misacepo' a lisin. Saka sepat, O kimad no mato'asay mafolaw tayni Ta'eman a niyaro'. O finawlan no niyaro' no Ta'eman nai saka'amis no Tingalaw Pacidal a ngasaw midoedo mililis to riyar pasitimol ato itiraay i Makerahay Ciwidian, Sadipongan a ngasaw, o pikilim to kaliomahan a malokelon tayni i niyaro' no Ta'eman (1886/1901), itiya toloay a ngasaw, o Pacidal, o Ciwidian, o Sadipongan a ngasawan, ira to ko romaroma a ngasaw miceroh tayni saka, ikor mata'elif to ko semo'otay a mihecaan, mala o cikimaday to ko masa'Amisay niyaro' i sawalian. Nano sowal no mato'asay nawiro o maan ko sakalinah a tayni, takaraw ko pala kanikawan to nanom, nawhani o karakaratan itini i. Sacisowal sa ko mato'asay, mingata to picekiwan ato pifotingan to saka'orip; ira ko masa'apilisay, manga'ayay pipalomaan to hafay ato roma pinaloma saka, o nian ko sakalinah a tayni saan. Orasaka o piahowid no teloc to mato'asay, midemak ko teloc a tamdaw no niyaro' to sapisacepo' a lisin. Pakayni i pisacepo' a lisin manengneng to, o midotocay ko kapah no 'Amis nai kasaselal a madadoedo i kasakakakaka tangasa i telocay a selal, o pahapinang to masasingodoay to kasakaka, kasa selaselal masasilifet, minengneng ko mato'asay to nialaan no kasaselal, inanengay a selal i kahemekan, o marowi'ay a selal i tefocen, o nialaan a foting, o sapakaen to mato'asay, nanoya minengneng to nga'ayay tadacaayay foting ko sapisilsil, nai mato'asay tangasa i kasararem mapakilac. Sakakaay selal ci'osaw to nikaenan pafelien ko kararemay, matira ko pasirarem ko paini, caay pilaom to kakaenan. Matiniay a lekakawa no 'Amis caay ka sawad tangasa anini.

t…ôŇči…ĺ…ôn ko~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mama no~u kapańß, o~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~u ° o~u to~umo~uk, to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč pa ¶akat no~u finaw…ĺan no~u nijaro~u °, saka, itini kami a mi °araj tiso~uwanan ma…ĺataw, ta faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u pia…ĺa nijam to~u kaka…ôn…ôn nijam to~unini a rijar, …¨~…ģipo~ut…ôn ko~u tajniaj a mi ¶…ôkiwaj, mi ¶…ô…ĺ…ômaj mifo~utiŇč, mitafo~uko~u…¨~…ģaj, patik…ô…¨~…ģaj mia…ĺaaj to~u kaka…ôn…ôn mama no~u kapańß. pańß…ôr…ôk ko~u pipa ¶akat, o~u mama no~u kappa ato~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~u ° patiko~u tajra i kasa °o~upo~uan pańßanńßan. i pańßanńßanan i, o~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~u ° ato~u ka…ĺas no~u nijaro~u ° masaso~uwaso~uwa…ĺ, pa °…ôs…ôs ko~u kakitaan to~u ka…ĺas no~u nijaro~u ° paso~uwa…ĺ to~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč …ĺ…ôkakawa no~u pisax…ôpo~u ° a pańß…ô ¶ian, o~u pito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u kasarar…ôrar…ôm a mi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶ to~unini a ta…¨~…ģamaanaj a po~unka no~u °amis. o~u kima…¨~…ģ no~u to~u °asan a pisa ¶…ôpo~u °. ira ko~u * tinako~u : saka ¶…ô ¶aj, tato~u °asan no~u °amis to~u fa °inajan fafańßijan a ma…ĺikakaaj tato~usa, ira ko~u tata °akaj …ĺ…ôn…ĺ…ôn i nijaro~u ° ma…ĺiki…¨~…ģ tajra i rijar, ma…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ to~u pipa…¨~…ģaŇč kawas no~u rijar pata…ĺas…ôka…ĺ (tajwan) mapa °o~urip, mirajraj to~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶. o~u sapiańßo~uwi…¨~…ģaw to~u pipa °o~urip no~u kawas saka, itira i katas…ôka…ĺan to~uja ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ no~u mińß…ô ¶aan, mi…¨~…ģ…ômak ko~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ no~u °amis a misa ¶…ôpo~u ° a …ĺisin. saka to~usa, ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj takarawaj mafana °aj mi °…ô…¨~…ģaw a…ĺikakaj a tam…¨~…ģaw, mirawraw to~u Ňča °ajaj °o~urip no~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, awaaj ko~u pasi ¶o~uwaan no~u finaw…ĺan itija. o~uja pipa…¨~…ģamso~u no~u kawas no~u rijar to~u sapisafa to~u a…ĺikakaj, iko~ur masasit…ô…ĺ…ôk to~u, pita °o~uŇčan to~u kawas no~u rijar a misa ¶…ôpo~u ° i, o~u °i ¶…ôp, …ôpańß ato~u to~uro~un ko~u sapa ¶akat i a…ĺikakaj, paka…¨~…ģo~ufańß…ôn no~u a…ĺikakaj ko~u ma °o~uripaj a fo~utiŇč, °afar i rijar i °a…ĺo~u, sakaira pinia…ĺa no~u °amis a tam…¨~…ģaw. saka to~u…ĺo~u, o~u °amis a tam…¨~…ģaw ¶i ma ¶iw ¶iw, to~una mipo~u…¨~…ģpo~u…¨~…ģ ¶iŇčra to~u kaso~uj i …ĺi…ĺis no~u rijar i, ta…ĺifańßa…ĺ sa ma °…ômo~u…¨~…ģ no~u °iso~u, mata °…ô…ĺif ko~u pinapina ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i, pakajra i nifa…ĺańßan masa…¨~…ģak tajra i rijar, ta ma…ĺiki…¨~…ģ tajra to~uja fa…ĺajsan, ro~ufo~u…ôn a ma…ĺakaka…ôn…ôn nasa, saan mapa…ĺafa ¶ mi…ĺa…ĺiw tajra i rijar, kasini °a…¨~…ģa…ôn no~u °iso~u ¶iŇčra saka, maŇča °aj ko~u pino~ukaj tajra i nijaro~u °. o~u piańßo~uwi…¨~…ģ no~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ to~u pa °o~urip no~u °iso~u, mi…¨~…ģ…ômak ko~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ no~u °amis a misa ¶…ôpo~u ° a …ĺisin. saka s…ôpat, o~u kima…¨~…ģ no~u mato~u °asaj mafo~u…ĺaw tajni ta °…ôman a nijaro~u °. o~u finaw…ĺan no~u nijaro~u ° no~u ta °…ôman nai saka °amis no~u tiŇča…ĺaw pa ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ a Ňčasaw mi…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u mi…ĺi…ĺis to~u rijar pasitimo~u…ĺ ato~u itiraaj i mak…ôrańßaj ¶iwi…¨~…ģian, sa…¨~…ģipo~uŇčan a Ňčasaw, o~u piki…ĺim to~u ka…ĺio~umańßan a ma…ĺo~uk…ô…ĺo~un tajni i nijaro~u ° no~u ta °…ôman (****/****), itija to~u…ĺo~uaj a Ňčasaw, o~u pa ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ, o~u ¶iwi…¨~…ģian, o~u sa…¨~…ģipo~uŇčan a Ňčasawan, ira to~u ko~u ro~umaro~uma a Ňčasaw mi ¶…ôro~uńß tajni saka, iko~ur mata °…ô…ĺif to~u ko~u s…ômo~u °o~utaj a mińß…ô ¶aan, ma…ĺa o~u ¶ikima…¨~…ģaj to~u ko~u masa °amisaj nijaro~u ° i sawa…ĺian. nano~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mato~u °asaj nawiro~u o~u maan ko~u saka…ĺinańß a tajni, takaraw ko~u pa…ĺa kanikawan to~u nano~um, nawńßani o~u karakaratan itini i. sa ¶iso~uwa…ĺ sa ko~u mato~u °asaj, miŇčata to~u pi ¶…ôkiwan ato~u pifo~utiŇčan to~u saka °o~urip; ira ko~u masa °api…ĺisaj, maŇča °ajaj pipa…ĺo~umaan to~u ńßafaj ato~u ro~uma pina…ĺo~uma saka, o~u nian ko~u saka…ĺinańß a tajni saan. o~urasaka o~u piańßo~uwi…¨~…ģ no~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ to~u mato~u °asaj, mi…¨~…ģ…ômak ko~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ a tam…¨~…ģaw no~u nijaro~u ° to~u sapisa ¶…ôpo~u ° a …ĺisin. pakajni i pisa ¶…ôpo~u ° a …ĺisin man…ôŇčn…ôŇč to~u, o~u mi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶aj ko~u kapańß no~u °amis nai kasas…ô…ĺa…ĺ a ma…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u i kasakakakaka taŇčasa i t…ô…ĺo~u ¶aj a s…ô…ĺa…ĺ, o~u pańßapinaŇč to~u masasiŇčo~u…¨~…ģo~uaj to~u kasakaka, kasa s…ô…ĺas…ô…ĺa…ĺ masasi…ĺif…ôt, min…ôŇčn…ôŇč ko~u mato~u °asaj to~u nia…ĺaan no~u kasas…ô…ĺa…ĺ, inan…ôŇčaj a s…ô…ĺa…ĺ i kańß…ôm…ôkan, o~u maro~uwi °aj a s…ô…ĺa…ĺ i t…ôfo~u ¶…ôn, o~u nia…ĺaan a fo~utiŇč, o~u sapaka…ôn to~u mato~u °asaj, nano~uja min…ôŇčn…ôŇč to~u Ňča °ajaj ta…¨~…ģa ¶aajaj fo~utiŇč ko~u sapisi…ĺsi…ĺ, nai mato~u °asaj taŇčasa i kasarar…ôm mapaki…ĺa ¶. sakakaaj s…ô…ĺa…ĺ ¶i °o~usaw to~u nika…ônan paf…ô…ĺi…ôn ko~u karar…ômaj, matira ko~u pasirar…ôm ko~u paini, ¶aaj pi…ĺao~um to~u kaka…ônan. matiniaj a …ĺ…ôkakawa no~u °amis ¶aaj ka sawa…¨~…ģ taŇčasa anini.
S.FORM: == Pisacepo' lisin no Ta'eman a niyaro' == Misacepo', Mikesi', Milaedis, Komoris To mihecahecaan, kalalaedan no saka lima folad saka enem folad, mili'ayaw to ko kakitaan no niyaro' ato mama no kapah masasowal to romi'ad ato mitelek, ikor o mama no kapah mipasifana' to finawlan no niyaro' to pisacepo'an lisin a romi'ad. Paso'elin ko 'Amis finacadan a tamdaw to to'as o milakecay to riyar a tayni sanay, orasaka o piahowid to nano pidipot to to'as a kawas no riyar patalahekal nai riyar saka ira ko pisacepo' a lisin. Matiniay pisacepo' a lisin, o pahapinangay to lekakawa no finacadan a saka'orip ato pingodo to kasairaira no tataparan. Mitolon to sakadofoh no piniala ato saka rihaday a mifoting. Pisacepo', Milaedis han no Cikasoan a 'Amis ko sowal, ono pasawaliay a 'Amis Misacepo' han ko sowal, ono katimolay a 'Amis Mikesi' han ko sowal, ono mililisay to tarawadaw to 'alo a 'Amis o Komoris han ko sowal, saka o kasasiroma to no niyaro' a sowal. Sapidemak to lisin to pisacepo', i'ayaw no kailisinan ko pidemak, nikawrira kasaniyaro' caay kalecad ko romi'ad, salongan itira i saka 6 folad tangasa saka 8 folad. Kaitiraan no niyaro' a masasiroma, saka ira ko pisacepo' ano eca mikomoris sanay a sowal. Pisacepo', ono 'Amis a tamdaw pahapinang to piahowid to kawas no riyar ato kawas no kakarayan ato sera, nawhani paso'elin ko 'Amis a tamdaw ira ko kasahirahira a kawas maparocek itini i tataparan, orasaka mingodo cangra to tataparan, nanay to mihecahecaan ci nialaay to kadofahay a foting ato 'afar. I pisacepo'an no niyaro' caay ka nga'ay mikihatiya ko fafahiyan, o nano rocok no to'as ano mikihatiya ko fafahiyan to pisacepo'an i, malo sakacaay pakaala to foting a mifoting saan. Patinako to no Ta'eman a niyaro', i 'ayaw pisacepo' no niyaro' i, o mama no kapah, pali'ayaw to kapah no niyaro' i 'ayaw pisacepo'an a dadaya tala riyar a micelem mifoting saka, toya niceleman kinaira sa'opoen i pisacepo'an a romi'ad, oya lakeling ato pakarongay ko midemakay (mikiskis to cikaf no foting, misiiked ato mitangtang). O roma kasasiiked selal a kapah citodong to roma a tayal (miala to dangah, hemay, kasoy, pakamaro'an to mato'asay, mitisil kasaselal). Itiya i, o mama no kapah malahakelong to kakitaan no niyaro' a tomok tayra pi'edawan kaitiraan. Sacepo' a lisin Sarakat, o kapah no niyaro' patelien i palo' ato i papah no pawli pateli koya nialaan a foting, masatisil ko mama no kapah i aikor no sapipacakat a losid, tahidangen ko kakitaan no niyaro' a tomok citodongay mipacakat a mita'ong, mifetir to epah, pakaen to toron a mitolon, miahowid to pidipot, ciniala to foting ato mamaala i riyar, mapakadofah ko pinaloma, pilitod ato sakarihaday no finawlan i niyaro'. (Mingitangit to malataw, to'as no niyaro' midipot to finawlan, ano tala riyar to, tala'alo to a mifoting, talalotok to maomah a kadofah, rihaday a minokay.) Pacakat ko kakitaan no niyaro' : "Waw‚Ä¶, Malatawaw! tayni kami anini. Itini i riyar, loma' no miso, nanay pafelien kami to iraay a alaen niyam, adihayen ko paini i tamiyan saka, itini kami a pacakat to sapakaen i tisowanan, layapen kaenen ko paini niyam to toron, o 'icep ato epah, ta malasang to kamo. Tengilen ko sowal no mama no kapah, o kakitaan no niyaro' o tomok, todong pacakat no finawlan no niyaro', saka, itini kami a mi'aray tisowanan malataw, ta fangcal ko piala niyam to kakaenen niyam tonini a riyar, dipoten ko tayniay a micekiway, micelemay mifoting, mitafokoday, patikeday mialaay to kakaenen a tamdaw i tamowanan, sanga'ayen parihadayen ko mialaay to kakaenen, pafelien ko mialaay to malo sapakaen to laloma'an a wawa ato saka'orip niyam saka, miaray i tisowanan. Kafecol to, kalasang to kamo. Waw‚Ä¶" Maherek ko kakitaan no niyaro'mitolon to pipacakat, ala mitatoy ko mama no kapah to takid, pasiriyar mita'ong to kawas mitakid, pasowal sa: "Ini ko epah, miso to koni, miaray to pipakalemed." Maherek ko pita'ong i, masasitakid (palemed) ko mama no kapah. Paherek ko pipacakat, o mama no kappa ato kakitaan no niyaro' patiko tayra i kasa'opoan pahanhan. I pahanhanan i, o kakitaan no niyaro' ato kalas no niyaro' masasowasowal, pa'eses ko kakitaan to kalas no niyaro' pasowal to todong lekakawa no pisaxepo' a pahecian, o pitodong no kasararerarem a midotoc tonini a tadamaanay a ponka no 'Amis. O kimad no to'asan a pisacepo'. Ira ko 4 tinako : Saka cecay, tato'asan no 'Amis to fa'inayan fafahiyan a malikakaay tatosa, ira ko tata'akay lenlen i niyaro' malikid tayra i riyar, malemed to pipadang kawas no riyar patalasekal (Taywan) mapa'orip, mirayray to teloc. O sapiahowidaw to pipa'orip no kawas saka, itira i katasekalan toya romi'ad no mihecaan, midemak ko teloc no 'Amis a misacepo' a lisin. Saka tosa, ira ko cecay takaraway mafana'ay mi'edaw Alikakay a tamdaw, mirawraw to nga'ayay 'orip no finacadan, awaay ko pasicowaan no finawlan itiya. Oya pipadamso no kawas no riyar to sapisafa to Alikakay, ikor masasitelek to, pita'ongan to kawas no riyar a misacepo' i, o 'icep, epah ato toron ko sapacakat i Alikakay, pakadofahen no Alikakay ko ma'oripay a foting, 'afar i riyar i 'alo, sakaira piniala no 'Amis a tamdaw. Saka tolo, o 'Amis a tamdaw ci Maciwciw, tona mipodpod cingra to kasoy i lilis no riyar i, talifahal sa ma'emod no 'iso, mata'elif ko pinapina romi'ad i, pakayra i nifalahan masadak tayra i riyar, ta malikid tayra toya Falaysan, rofoen a malakakaenen nasa, saan mapalafac milaliw tayra i riyar, kasini'adaen no 'iso cingra saka, manga'ay ko pinokay tayra i niyaro'. O piahowid no teloc to pa'orip no 'iso, midemak ko teloc no 'Amis a misacepo' a lisin. Saka sepat, O kimad no mato'asay mafolaw tayni Ta'eman a niyaro'. O finawlan no niyaro' no Ta'eman nai saka'amis no Tingalaw Pacidal a ngasaw midoedo mililis to riyar pasitimol ato itiraay i Makerahay Ciwidian, Sadipongan a ngasaw, o pikilim to kaliomahan a malokelon tayni i niyaro' no Ta'eman (1886/1901), itiya toloay a ngasaw, o Pacidal, o Ciwidian, o Sadipongan a ngasawan, ira to ko romaroma a ngasaw miceroh tayni saka, ikor mata'elif to ko semo'otay a mihecaan, mala o cikimaday to ko masa'Amisay niyaro' i sawalian. Nano sowal no mato'asay nawiro o maan ko sakalinah a tayni, takaraw ko pala kanikawan to nanom, nawhani o karakaratan itini i. Sacisowal sa ko mato'asay, mingata to picekiwan ato pifotingan to saka'orip; ira ko masa'apilisay, manga'ayay pipalomaan to hafay ato roma pinaloma saka, o nian ko sakalinah a tayni saan. Orasaka o piahowid no teloc to mato'asay, midemak ko teloc a tamdaw no niyaro' to sapisacepo' a lisin. Pakayni i pisacepo' a lisin manengneng to, o midotocay ko kapah no 'Amis nai kasaselal a madadoedo i kasakakakaka tangasa i telocay a selal, o pahapinang to masasingodoay to kasakaka, kasa selaselal masasilifet, minengneng ko mato'asay to nialaan no kasaselal, inanengay a selal i kahemekan, o marowi'ay a selal i tefocen, o nialaan a foting, o sapakaen to mato'asay, nanoya minengneng to nga'ayay tadacaayay foting ko sapisilsil, nai mato'asay tangasa i kasararem mapakilac. Sakakaay selal ci'osaw to nikaenan pafelien ko kararemay, matira ko pasirarem ko paini, caay pilaom to kakaenan. Matiniay a lekakawa no 'Amis caay ka sawad tangasa anini.

no~u nijaro~u ° to~u pisa ¶…ôpo~u °an …ĺisin a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. paso~u °…ô…ĺin ko~u °amis fina ¶a…¨~…ģan a tam…¨~…ģaw to~u to~u °as o~u mi…ĺak…ô ¶aj to~u rijar a tajni sanaj, o~urasaka o~u piańßo~uwi…¨~…ģ to~u nano~u pi…¨~…ģipo~ut to~u to~u °as a kawas no~u rijar pata…ĺańß…ôka…ĺ nai rijar saka ira ko~u pisa ¶…ôpo~u ° a …ĺisin. matiniaj pisa ¶…ôpo~u ° a …ĺisin, o~u pańßapinaŇčaj to~u mi…ĺi…ĺisaj to~u tarawa…¨~…ģaw to~u °a…ĺo~u a °amis o~u ko~umo~uris ńßan ko~u so~uwa…ĺ, saka o~u kasasiro~uma to~u no~u nijaro~u ° a so~uwa…ĺ. sapi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u …ĺisin to~u pisa ¶…ôpo~u °, i °ajaw no~u kai…ĺisinan ko~u pi…¨~…ģ…ômak, nikawrira kasanijaro~u ° ¶aaj ka…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ ko~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, sa…ĺo~uŇčan itira i saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ taŇčasa saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ. kaitiraan no~u nijaro~u ° a masasiro~uma, saka ira ko~u pisa ¶…ôpo~u ° ano~u …ô ¶a miko~umo~uris sanaj a so~uwa…ĺ. pisa ¶…ôpo~u °, o~uno~u °amis a tam…¨~…ģaw pańßapinaŇč to~u piańßo~uwi…¨~…ģ to~u kawas no~u rijar ato~u kawas no~u kakarajan ato~u s…ôra, nawńßani paso~u °…ô…ĺin ko~u °amis a tam…¨~…ģaw ira ko~u kasańßirańßira a kawas maparo~u ¶…ôk itini i tataparan, o~urasaka miŇčo~u…¨~…ģo~u ¶aŇčra to~u tataparan, nanaj to~u mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶aan ¶i nia…ĺaaj to~u ka…¨~…ģo~ufańßaj a fo~utiŇč ato~u °afar. i pisa ¶…ôpo~u °an no~u nijaro~u ° ¶aaj ka Ňča °aj mikińßatija ko~u fafańßijan, o~u nano~u ro~u ¶o~uk no~u to~u °as ano~u mikińßatija ko~u fafańßijan to~u pisa ¶…ôpo~u °an i, ma…ĺo~u saka ¶aaj pakaa…ĺa to~u fo~utiŇč a mifo~utiŇč saan. patinako~u to~u no~u ta °…ôman a nijaro~u °, i °ajaw pisa ¶…ôpo~u ° no~u nijaro~u ° i, o~u mama no~u kapańß, pa…ĺi °ajaw to~u kapańß no~u nijaro~u ° i °ajaw pisa ¶…ôpo~u °an a …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaja ta…ĺa rijar a mi ¶…ô…ĺ…ôm mifo~utiŇč saka, to~uja ni ¶…ô…ĺ…ôman kinaira sa °o~upo~u…ôn i pisa ¶…ôpo~u °an a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, o~uja …ĺak…ô…ĺiŇč ato~u pakaro~uŇčaj ko~u mi…¨~…ģ…ômakaj (mikiskis to~u ¶ikaf no~u fo~utiŇč, misiik…ô…¨~…ģ ato~u mitaŇčtaŇč). o~u ro~uma kasasiik…ô…¨~…ģ s…ô…ĺa…ĺ a kapańß ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u ro~uma a taja…ĺ (mia…ĺa to~u …¨~…ģaŇčańß, ńß…ômaj, kaso~uj, pakamaro~u °an to~u mato~u °asaj, mitisi…ĺ kasas…ô…ĺa…ĺ). itija i, o~u mama no~u kapańß ma…ĺańßak…ô…ĺo~uŇč to~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~u ° a to~umo~uk tajra pi °…ô…¨~…ģawan kaitiraan. sa ¶…ôpo~u ° a …ĺisin sarakat, o~u kapańß no~u nijaro~u ° pat…ô…ĺi…ôn i pa…ĺo~u ° ato~u i papańß no~u paw…ĺi pat…ô…ĺi ko~uja nia…ĺaan a fo~utiŇč, masatisi…ĺ ko~u mama no~u kapańß i aiko~ur no~u sapipa ¶akat a …ĺo~usi…¨~…ģ, tańßi…¨~…ģaŇč…ôn ko~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~u ° a to~umo~uk ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj mipa ¶akat a mita °o~uŇč, mif…ôtir to~u …ôpańß, paka…ôn to~u to~uro~un a mito~u…ĺo~un, miańßo~uwi…¨~…ģ to~u pi…¨~…ģipo~ut, ¶inia…ĺa to~u fo~utiŇč ato~u mamaa…ĺa i rijar, mapaka…¨~…ģo~ufańß ko~u pina…ĺo~uma, pi…ĺito~u…¨~…ģ ato~u sakarińßa…¨~…ģaj no~u finaw…ĺan i nijaro~u °. (miŇčitaŇčit to~u ma…ĺataw, to~u °as no~u nijaro~u ° mi…¨~…ģipo~ut to~u finaw…ĺan, ano~u ta…ĺa rijar to~u, ta…ĺa °a…ĺo~u to~u a mifo~utiŇč, ta…ĺa…ĺo~uto~uk to~u mao~umańß a ka…¨~…ģo~ufańß, rińßa…¨~…ģaj a mino~ukaj.) pa ¶akat ko~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~u ° : "waw*, ma…ĺatawaw! tajni kami anini. itini i rijar, …ĺo~uma ° no~u miso~u, nanaj paf…ô…ĺi…ôn kami to~u iraaj a a…ĺa…ôn nijam, a…¨~…ģińßaj…ôn ko~u paini i tamijan saka, itini kami a pa ¶akat to~u sapaka…ôn i tiso~uwanan, …ĺajap…ôn ka…ôn…ôn ko~u paini nijam to~u to~uro~un, o~u °i ¶…ôp ato~u …ôpańß, ta ma…ĺasaŇč to~u kamo~u. t…ôŇči…ĺ…ôn ko~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mama no~u kapańß, o~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~u ° o~u to~umo~uk, to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč pa ¶akat no~u finaw…ĺan no~u nijaro~u °, saka, itini kami a mi °araj tiso~uwanan ma…ĺataw, ta faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u pia…ĺa nijam to~u kaka…ôn…ôn nijam to~unini a rijar, …¨~…ģipo~ut…ôn ko~u tajniaj a mi ¶…ôkiwaj, mi ¶…ô…ĺ…ômaj mifo~utiŇč, mitafo~uko~u…¨~…ģaj, patik…ô…¨~…ģaj mia…ĺaaj to~u kaka…ôn…ôn a tam…¨~…ģaw i tamo~uwanan, saŇča °aj…ôn parińßa…¨~…ģaj…ôn ko~u mia…ĺaaj to~u kaka…ôn…ôn, paf…ô…ĺi…ôn ko~u mia…ĺaaj to~u ma…ĺo~u sapaka…ôn to~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an a wawa ato~u saka °o~urip nijam saka, miaraj i tiso~uwanan. kaf…ô ¶o~u…ĺ to~u, ka…ĺasaŇč to~u kamo~u. waw*" mańß…ôr…ôk ko~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~u °mito~u…ĺo~un to~u pipa ¶akat, a…ĺa mitato~uj ko~u mama no~u kapańß to~u taki…¨~…ģ, pasirijar mita °o~uŇč to~u kawas mitaki…¨~…ģ, paso~uwa…ĺ sa: "ini ko~u …ôpańß, miso~u to~u ko~uni, miaraj to~u pipaka…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ." mańß…ôr…ôk ko~u pita °o~uŇč i, masasitaki…¨~…ģ (pa…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ) ko~u mama no~u kapańß. pańß…ôr…ôk ko~u pipa ¶akat, o~u mama no~u kappa ato~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~u ° patiko~u tajra i kasa °o~upo~uan pańßanńßan. i pańßanńßanan i, o~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~u ° ato~u ka…ĺas no~u nijaro~u ° masaso~uwaso~uwa…ĺ, pa °…ôs…ôs ko~u kakitaan to~u ka…ĺas no~u nijaro~u ° paso~uwa…ĺ to~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč …ĺ…ôkakawa no~u pisax…ôpo~u ° a pańß…ô ¶ian, o~u pito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u kasarar…ôrar…ôm a mi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶ to~unini a ta…¨~…ģamaanaj a po~unka no~u °amis. o~u kima…¨~…ģ no~u to~u °asan a pisa ¶…ôpo~u °. ira ko~u * tinako~u : saka ¶…ô ¶aj, tato~u °asan no~u °amis to~u fa °inajan fafańßijan a ma…ĺikakaaj tato~usa, ira ko~u tata °akaj …ĺ…ôn…ĺ…ôn i nijaro~u ° ma…ĺiki…¨~…ģ tajra i rijar, ma…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ to~u pipa…¨~…ģaŇč kawas no~u rijar pata…ĺas…ôka…ĺ (tajwan) mapa °o~urip, mirajraj to~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶. o~u sapiańßo~uwi…¨~…ģaw to~u pipa °o~urip no~u kawas saka, itira i katas…ôka…ĺan to~uja ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ no~u mińß…ô ¶aan, mi…¨~…ģ…ômak ko~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ no~u °amis a misa ¶…ôpo~u ° a …ĺisin. saka to~usa, ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj takarawaj mafana °aj mi °…ô…¨~…ģaw a…ĺikakaj a tam…¨~…ģaw, mirawraw to~u Ňča °ajaj °o~urip no~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, awaaj ko~u pasi ¶o~uwaan no~u finaw…ĺan itija. o~uja pipa…¨~…ģamso~u no~u kawas no~u rijar to~u sapisafa to~u a…ĺikakaj, iko~ur masasit…ô…ĺ…ôk to~u, pita °o~uŇčan to~u kawas no~u rijar a misa ¶…ôpo~u ° i, o~u °i ¶…ôp, …ôpańß ato~u to~uro~un ko~u sapa ¶akat i a…ĺikakaj, paka…¨~…ģo~ufańß…ôn no~u a…ĺikakaj ko~u ma °o~uripaj a fo~utiŇč, °afar i rijar i °a…ĺo~u, sakaira pinia…ĺa no~u °amis a tam…¨~…ģaw. saka to~u…ĺo~u, o~u °amis a tam…¨~…ģaw ¶i ma ¶iw ¶iw, to~una mipo~u…¨~…ģpo~u…¨~…ģ ¶iŇčra to~u kaso~uj i …ĺi…ĺis no~u rijar i, ta…ĺifańßa…ĺ sa ma °…ômo~u…¨~…ģ no~u °iso~u, mata °…ô…ĺif ko~u pinapina ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i, pakajra i nifa…ĺańßan masa…¨~…ģak tajra i rijar, ta ma…ĺiki…¨~…ģ tajra to~uja fa…ĺajsan, ro~ufo~u…ôn a ma…ĺakaka…ôn…ôn nasa, saan mapa…ĺafa ¶ mi…ĺa…ĺiw tajra i rijar, kasini °a…¨~…ģa…ôn no~u °iso~u ¶iŇčra saka, maŇča °aj ko~u pino~ukaj tajra i nijaro~u °. o~u piańßo~uwi…¨~…ģ no~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ to~u pa °o~urip no~u °iso~u, mi…¨~…ģ…ômak ko~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ no~u °amis a misa ¶…ôpo~u ° a …ĺisin. saka s…ôpat, o~u kima…¨~…ģ no~u mato~u °asaj mafo~u…ĺaw tajni ta °…ôman a nijaro~u °. o~u finaw…ĺan no~u nijaro~u ° no~u ta °…ôman nai saka °amis no~u tiŇča…ĺaw pa ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ a Ňčasaw mi…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u mi…ĺi…ĺis to~u rijar pasitimo~u…ĺ ato~u itiraaj i mak…ôrańßaj ¶iwi…¨~…ģian, sa…¨~…ģipo~uŇčan a Ňčasaw, o~u piki…ĺim to~u ka…ĺio~umańßan a ma…ĺo~uk…ô…ĺo~un tajni i nijaro~u ° no~u ta °…ôman (****/****), itija to~u…ĺo~uaj a Ňčasaw, o~u pa ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ, o~u ¶iwi…¨~…ģian, o~u sa…¨~…ģipo~uŇčan a Ňčasawan, ira to~u ko~u ro~umaro~uma a Ňčasaw mi ¶…ôro~uńß tajni saka, iko~ur mata °…ô…ĺif to~u ko~u s…ômo~u °o~utaj a mińß…ô ¶aan, ma…ĺa o~u ¶ikima…¨~…ģaj to~u ko~u masa °amisaj nijaro~u ° i sawa…ĺian. nano~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mato~u °asaj nawiro~u o~u maan ko~u saka…ĺinańß a tajni, takaraw ko~u pa…ĺa kanikawan to~u nano~um, nawńßani o~u karakaratan itini i. sa ¶iso~uwa…ĺ sa ko~u mato~u °asaj, miŇčata to~u pi ¶…ôkiwan ato~u pifo~utiŇčan to~u saka °o~urip; ira ko~u masa °api…ĺisaj, maŇča °ajaj pipa…ĺo~umaan to~u ńßafaj ato~u ro~uma pina…ĺo~uma saka, o~u nian ko~u saka…ĺinańß a tajni saan. o~urasaka o~u piańßo~uwi…¨~…ģ no~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ to~u mato~u °asaj, mi…¨~…ģ…ômak ko~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ a tam…¨~…ģaw no~u nijaro~u ° to~u sapisa ¶…ôpo~u ° a …ĺisin. pakajni i pisa ¶…ôpo~u ° a …ĺisin man…ôŇčn…ôŇč to~u, o~u mi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶aj ko~u kapańß no~u °amis nai kasas…ô…ĺa…ĺ a ma…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u i kasakakakaka taŇčasa i t…ô…ĺo~u ¶aj a s…ô…ĺa…ĺ, o~u pańßapinaŇč to~u masasiŇčo~u…¨~…ģo~uaj to~u kasakaka, kasa s…ô…ĺas…ô…ĺa…ĺ masasi…ĺif…ôt, min…ôŇčn…ôŇč ko~u mato~u °asaj to~u nia…ĺaan no~u kasas…ô…ĺa…ĺ, inan…ôŇčaj a s…ô…ĺa…ĺ i kańß…ôm…ôkan, o~u maro~uwi °aj a s…ô…ĺa…ĺ i t…ôfo~u ¶…ôn, o~u nia…ĺaan a fo~utiŇč, o~u sapaka…ôn to~u mato~u °asaj, nano~uja min…ôŇčn…ôŇč to~u Ňča °ajaj ta…¨~…ģa ¶aajaj fo~utiŇč ko~u sapisi…ĺsi…ĺ, nai mato~u °asaj taŇčasa i kasarar…ôm mapaki…ĺa ¶. sakakaaj s…ô…ĺa…ĺ ¶i °o~usaw to~u nika…ônan paf…ô…ĺi…ôn ko~u karar…ômaj, matira ko~u pasirar…ôm ko~u paini, ¶aaj pi…ĺao~um to~u kaka…ônan. matiniaj a …ĺ…ôkakawa no~u °amis ¶aaj ka sawa…¨~…ģ taŇčasa anini.
